blocks.text: Clay Court Tennis Opens as Wærenskjold Eyes Dwars Door Vlaanderen Glory

Monday is a quiet prelude before a big week. Tennis dips into Bucharest while Norwegian cycling fans look ahead — Søren Wærenskjold lines up for Wednesday's Dwars door Vlaanderen, a crucial spring classic warm-up.
🎾 Tiriac Open, Bucharest — ATP 250 clay court action begins in Romania at 11:00
Højgaard is one shot off the lead in Houston — a Scandinavian victory on PGA Tour soil would be the story of the week. Watch him closely as the final round unfolds.
